changes: Redeployed on GembaBlockchain — GembaTicket's own EVM-compatible Layer-1 with ~0 gas fees (testnet now, mainnet 821206 rolling out). Same 4-role operator model; the backend relays/signs transactions so non-web3 organizers and attendees never deal with wallets, gas, or signing (invisible blockchain). Per-event contracts are EIP-1167 minimal-proxy clones of the templates, deployed free on demand. Zero platform fees.

configuration.payments: All payments via GembaPay (contracts are payment-agnostic); 0 platform fees
configuration.gas: Negligible — GembaBlockchain native gas ~0; backend sponsors/relays so users never pay or sign
configuration.nft: Multi-page NFT — poster image + on-chain event details (attributes) + interactive QR page (animation_url)
